fixtures.description: Synthetic tool definitions with concise and noisy schemas.
fixtures.expected_behavior: preserve tool names, parameter names, required fields, and safety-relevant descriptions; collapse repeated schema boilerplate

fixtures.description: Synthetic MCP schema/config output with repeated boilerplate.
fixtures.expected_behavior: preserve tool name, status, arguments, error/result counts, and first useful schema entries

fixtures.description: Generic command output with progress noise, warning, error, paths, and exit status.
fixtures.expected_behavior: preserve command, warning, file path, assertion, and exit code; collapse progress noise
must_preserve: $ npm run generate && npm run check

fixtures.description: Synthetic TypeScript build log with install noise and root-cause compiler error.
fixtures.expected_behavior: route through log compressor and preserve root cause

fixtures.description: Synthetic pytest failure with traceback and passing-test noise.
fixtures.expected_behavior: route through log compressor and preserve failed test, assertion, file:line, command, and exit code

fixtures.description: Ripgrep-like output with repeated matches across source and tests.
fixtures.expected_behavior: route through search compressor and preserve query, files, line numbers, and relevant matches

fixtures.description: Source file read that should be preserved rather than blindly compressed.
fixtures.expected_behavior: bypass compression and preserve source code verbatim

fixtures.description: Generated/vendor file read with repeated blocks and a useful header.
fixtures.expected_behavior: collapse repeated generated noise or bypass with an explicit preservation guard

fixtures.description: Repository tree with package roots, config files, source/test shape, and generated directories.
fixtures.expected_behavior: route through file-tree compressor and preserve package roots, config files, source/test shape, and referenced paths

fixtures.description: Git diff with file status, hunk headers, changed symbols, imports, and test impact.
fixtures.expected_behavior: route through diff compressor and preserve file paths, status, hunk headers, symbols, imports, and tests

fixtures.description: Synthetic retrieved documentation chunks with overlapping boilerplate.
fixtures.expected_behavior: preserve document IDs, relevant snippets, and retrieval scores; collapse boilerplate

fixtures.description: Synthetic API/database response with repeated fields and one error row.
fixtures.expected_behavior: preserve status, result count, first useful rows, error/status evidence, and path-like IDs

fixtures.description: Synthetic older turn residue kept only for benchmark measurement.
fixtures.expected_behavior: preserve command/result evidence and collapse repeated stale conversation residue without implementing compaction
preserve repository rules, test command, and safety boundaries; collapse repeated reminders
must_preserve: Loopback retrieve guard must remain enabled

fixtures.description: Synthetic retrieved-original record from a local CCR lookup.
fixtures.expected_behavior: preserve marker hash, retrieval status, source path, and first restored evidence

fixtures.description: Synthetic sandbox/code-execution artifact summary with raw artifact kept out-of-band.
fixtures.expected_behavior: preserve artifact id, exit code, kept-out path, and diagnostic line; collapse raw artifact preview

fixtures.description: Compatibility fixture for H006 package metadata routing.
fixtures.expected_behavior: preserve scripts, dependencies, dev dependencies, and toolchain hints

fixtures.description: Compatibility fixture for H006 MCP tool response routing.
fixtures.expected_behavior: preserve tool status, error, count, and first results; collapse excess result objects
